title: German-Style Keto Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful keto stir fry inspired by traditional German cuisine, featuring crispy potatoes and a peppery kick.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of avocado oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add diced potatoes and cook until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Add chopped garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add chopped German bacon and cook until crispy, about 3 minutes.
Add peppery stir fry sauce and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
Optional: Serve with a side of riced cauliflower or a green salad.
